notes: Metadata-driven restack: PROC SQL reads coverage_start#/coverage_end# names from dictionary.columns into :s1-:s9999 / :e1-:e9999, then a %do loop un-transposes each window using keep=(... rename=(...)) dataset options, verbatim from the coverage_date_ranges macro. Synthetic transposed coverage tables (3 windows, one account with all three, one with two). Demonstrates the dictionary.columns / dynamic-loop technique the README highlights.
